expectations.text: Gate B fired: asked for the actual page (paste copy / URL / screenshot) plus goal and audience BEFORE auditing
expectations.evidence: The response asks for the copy itself, the goal (what action to drive), and who is landing on the page before providing any audit.

expectations.text: Did NOT invent the page's contents and audit its own invention
expectations.evidence: The response contains no invented page content or audit findings — it only asks questions and explains what it will do once it has the real content.

expectations.text: May offer a clearly-labeled generic checklist as a fallback
expectations.evidence: The response explicitly offers: 'If you can't share the copy right now, I can give you a general pricing page audit checklist' as a labeled fallback.
